full_text:
Lady Li
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Li. Concubine of Liu Shan, she killed herself rather then be given to a Wei general. Lady Li was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Lady Li lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
